<Badge text="find-skills" variant="note" /> <Badge text="16 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Avoid default" variant="danger" /> <Badge text="global-only-or-avoid" variant="default" />

> duplicate of `harness-master` discover (systematic gap pipeline).

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add vercel-labs/skills@find-skills --skill find-skills -y -g
```

**Use:** `/find-skills`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/find-skills.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets all supported agent harnesses via the install command below.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add vercel-labs/skills@find-skills --skill find-skills -y -g
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Avoid default** (`global-only-or-avoid`)

Curated status: `global-only-or-avoid`

Risk notes: duplicate of `harness-master` discover (systematic gap pipeline).

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Vercel find-skills; overlaps with harness-master Discover for systematic gap expansion. Marked global-only-or-avoid to avoid bloat and duplication in curated surface.

## Install Prerequisites

Avoid; status=global-only-or-avoid; unresolved.

## Upstream Maintainer

[vercel-labs/skills](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) @find-skills tag.

## Comparable Alternatives

harness-master Discover (local canonical for systematic gap/MCP/plugin/hook expansion); find-skills for ad-hoc `npx skills find` queries.

&gt; Config rationale + web vercel labs.
